caption: A man wearing a white lab coat over pink scrubs and a dark lanyard sits in a chair, resting his head on his right hand in a gesture of frustration or exhaustion. He is positioned in an indoor setting with light-colored walls and a neutral-toned surface behind him. To his left, a black screen displays white text stating, "This video was produced and edited by MIEMSS Media Services in partnership with the University of Maryland Department of Surgery and the R Adams Cowley Shock Trauma Center." Below this text is a large QR code and the email address "lbuchanan@som.umaryland.edu". Across the sequence, the man remains in a nearly identical pose, with only slight movements in his posture and expression, while the static text and QR code remain constant on the left side of the scene.
